title: Demo 1: The AgentCard
description: Understand what an AgentCard is — the 'business card' of the A2A protocol. No running code, just reading and understanding.

scenes.title: Introduction
scenes.description: Set the stage: A2A is a protocol, AgentCard is its foundation.

scenes.title: What's inside an AgentCard?
scenes.description: Show the slide explaining AgentCard fields.

scenes.title: PirateSpecialist — the AI agent's card
scenes.description: Open the PirateSpecialist and highlight its AgentCard definition.

scenes.title: Focus on Skills and Tags
scenes.description: Zoom in on the Skills array — these are the routing keywords.

scenes.title: DictionaryAgent — the zero-AI agent's card
scenes.description: Same protocol, different brain. No AI at all.

scenes.title: Compare the Tags
scenes.description: The DictionaryAgent has 'no-ai' and 'educational' tags — this will matter for routing later.

scenes.title: How are cards exposed?
scenes.description: Show Program.cs where MapA2A and MapWellKnownAgentCard register the endpoints.

scenes.title: MapA2A — one call, full protocol
scenes.description: Highlight how MapA2A maps the JSON-RPC endpoint for each agent.

scenes.title: Takeaway
scenes.description: A2A is a protocol, not an AI framework.
